agents.name: Wallet Assistant Agent
agents.description: Answers player questions about SOL balance, escrow status, deposit/withdrawal history, and wallet health in a casual, playful tone. Receives wallet state as prompt context from the frontend.

agents.name: Fairness Verifier Agent
agents.description: Explains the commit-reveal proof for a specific duel — breaks down the SHA256 commit hash, reveal value, and on-chain verification in simple, casual language so players trust the outcome.

agents.name: Match Insight Agent
agents.description: Generates a fun, casual post-duel summary for a completed match — includes wager amount, outcome, streak context, and a playful quip. Receives match data as prompt context.
